economic_notes: Nation has investments in forestry operations (Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP), property management (Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society), and real estate (Centre Creek LP) in and around Chilliwack, BC. COVID-19 noted as a significant event with uncertain future impact. Forensic audit of prior year financial statements not yet released.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020 (March 31, 2020). Five GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP, Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry Ltd., Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society, Centre Creek LP, Centre Creek Management Ltd. Ottawa Trust Fund of $965,853 held by Government of Canada on behalf of the Nation is included in financial assets. No long-term debt on the Nation's own balance sheet (GBE Centre Creek LP has long-term liabilities of $704,806 but not consolidated). Deferred revenue relates solely to ISC Flood Mitigation Funding. A forensic audit of prior year statements had not been released at the time of reporting. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Salaries total derived from segment schedule (Administration $305,094 + Education $516,922 + Health $37,682 + Social Development $194,002 + Maintenance $14,549 + Employment $80,178 + Housing $0 + Capital $0 + Ottawa Trust $0 = approximately $1,349,348 but segment data was partially reversed in text; total_government_transfers estimated as ISC $2,521,885 + FNHA $657,472 + Province of BC $372,126 + FNESC $134,683 + First Nation Tax Commission $25,609 = $3,711,775 plus Ottawa Trust Fund income $27,179 and other government items; osr calculated as total revenue minus estimated government transfers).
